rows.consumerBehaviorFound: Empty or [[EMPTY]] disables the shader. Non-empty values are resolved relative to the main config path, must be regular readable files, are loaded as fragment shader source, and are compiled into the final screen shader program.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Defer repair until display/render high-risk review decides whether file existence/readability and shader compile checks are required before write planning.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Optional shader path picker with warning that bad shaders can affect final screen rendering.
rows.highRiskReason: Consumer is display/render compile-sensitive rather than a plain path string.
